reviews.review_title: I ❤️ TMM it is my top 1 favorit VR game!
reviews.review_description: This game just keep’s getting better and better! I have ben here sins Devlog UNO/1 it looked so fun so i followed the jerney until it got released! I make videos about it and play it all day long it is realy that good! I realy want 🫵YOU to download it and try it right now you are gonna LOVE! IT bye✌️

This game is amazing but at the moment some people aren’t able to play but that will be fixed but the game is very good and addictive. I’ve been playing the game for a while now collecting ores, recording videos, and making friends and it is really fun. There is a lot to do (exploring, making videos, looking for ores, etc) I can’t wait to play when the game is fixed so I can play with others and have an amazing time!!! Highly recommended ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.review_title: It’s extremely buggy and pretty bad
reviews.review_description: IVE been waiting for The Mighty Mine to officially release for what feels like forever. I always watched their Tik Toks and I always got upset whenever it got delayed. Now that it finally released after all this time, it’s just a buggy mess that barely functions. For the first week, I couldn’t get the week one cosmetic or anything. I can’t even sell anything without the game lagging. By the way, people in this game are either extremely toxic or just plain racist. In every public lobby I go in, there is at least one person swearing their minds off or just saying the n-word over and over. Anyway I don’t recommend this buggy mess to anyone looking for a good VR game.

This game has really good potential just there’s to much bugs. I log on for the first time to get the free headset just for it not to work. I restarted my game around five times just so I could get the headset. Then I started playing the actual game and the shedder does not work so I restarted my game five more times just for there to be nothing to use the coins for. I log on the next day for all my stuff and cosmetics to be gone and the map is see through and you can’t do anything. I met the owner and he said the bugs would be patched in 15-20minutes so I wait and when the update happens they added the map back but there was no collision. Over all I would say this game is good just they need to work better on bug patching.

Only after getting everything but I mean there's not a lot of places and the only other event rn Is the summer one so what y'all should do is after u get to area 3 u unlock world 2 and it has harder stuff and more monsters but add fake things like the orbs inside the summer event but with leeches inside the world 2 and stuff

So it took a year and a half to make this, and I would say that any apk release, is better than the actual full release. The devs blamed that “meta was the problem” or “applab won’t work”, when in reality the game was just never finished. And even despite delaying the full game for 4 months, the game is just boring. You can get a good 20 minutes of gameplay but after that the game is just the same thing over and over. Also, the bundle that costs $21, sure I can pass by someone trying to make money for things like servers, or for themselves. But 21 dollars for like 5 cosmetics? Even ontop of all that the iap’s are just broken, I guarantee you this game doesn’t make it even 2 months before the owner says some “everyone bad news” and then abandons the game forever. And I could just keep going on with it, even if did want to play it, servers and tokens don’t even load half the time. Trully, any apk version was ten times better, and the game is just bad all the way.

To be honest for all the people that are writing bad reviews saying they can’t play the game are stupid. The servers weren’t working at the time I get they don’t understand that since ￼ they don’t have discord, but they should do some research before they say anything. I absolutely love this game by the time of writing this review area 2 just came out ￼ and I think they should fix it a little bit

Hello my name is soul and I’m going to give you an honest review about this game. This game has very great potential, I see lots of things that could make this game better but overall, it just has good potential.￼ it’s laggy, but it’s in beta, like today I met a beta tester named Lucky ￼(very cool guy)￼ and I could definitely tell that he is putting in the hours to help this game. (thanks)￼￼ so I definitely think you should get this game if you’re having trouble it’s just glitches that are happening.

Well, I hope I see you in the mines!￼

Soul
